{{Quote|Eight, four lit and ready.|Leth Liav|<ref name="Rebel Stand" />}}
'''Leth Liav''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], who had been shot down and captured by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Placed in an environment bubble and launched through space towards [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias's]] atmosphere by the Yuuzhan Vong, she and the other prisoners were saved by some fancy flying by [[Twin Suns Squadron]].<ref name="Rebel Stand" />

Because of the high level of attrition, she was accepted into [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] as Rogue Eight and served as part of [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] [[shield trio]].<ref name="Rebel Stand" />
